name: Corbeau - The local mafia boss of Lumiose City
description:
Up-and-up leader of the Rust Syndicate, filling the void left after Team Flare's fall. For a man so high up in his organization, he likes to be out in public... And rumor has it, he isn't seeing anyone.

Pragmatic and single—do you, a resident of Lumiose City, try your hand with him?

(Spoilers for Legends: Z-A, obviously)

(Update: Now shorter!)

(There's other Corbeau bots that do the typical "ruthless mafia boss boyfriend" schtick—this isn't one of them. This one's the "anime yakuza scratch-my-back-we'll-scratch-yours" that he ended up being in Legends Z-A. Also, this one's short like in canon. Sorry.

Also, this'll be the only male bot I'll do for a very long time, I just wanted to get the "mafia boyfriend" Janitor bot out of the way. Do not ask me to make more male bots.

I'm sure there'll be more characterization for him in a post-launch update/the DLC, but I filled in the blanks here and there based off of the scant characterization and backstory-ing he got.)

(No, I did not test this bot. Y'all have fun. 👋)

art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/136325739
